titleStmt.title: SII 10.171: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 171. (A.R. No. 658 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF CHŌḌĒŚVARA AT MOPAṞṞU, TENALI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1092.

summary.p: States that Paḍavālu Gōṅka and his wife Gōkāmbikā made a gift of perpetual lamps to the temple of Chōḍēśvara-Mahādēva of Mrōmpaṟṟu. Gives a list of the dancing girls attached to the temple and the extent of land granted to each by way of emoluments. Gōṅka who is described as the general of the ruler of the Velanāṇḍu six-thousand is said to have vanquished thirty thousand Karnāṭa troops (horse).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti paḍavālu cōḍa I
ti vikhyātaprabhāvāN ba
lī saddhṛtyō vēlanāṁṭigō
ṁka nripati(?)ryyaṣṣaṭsahasrā
vanīṁ vēṁgīṁ pālayatō pa
rākramanidhi stasyā nurūpāṁga
nā kaṭṭāṁbā budhabandhupō
ṣaṇaratā saubhāgyabhāgyānvitā . tā
bhyāṁ śūdrakulēṁdrakarmmaraṇakṛt
gōṁkaḥ kṣatāṁkō bhavat . yaḥ ka
rnnāṭakaghōṭakaiḥ kritaraṇa strīṁśatsa
hasrai ssaha krocceṟvu lpura mēka Ēva
nikaṣā vīraśriyā sēvita śrīcōḍakṣiti
pālakasya paḍavālunāmāṁkita ssadbha
ṭa tasyāṁgganā tatijaṁggama
kalpavallī gōkāṁbikā guṇavatī
manāṁśīlā yasyāḥ pitā bhava
ti nāyakamuccanākhyō mātāca
sūrivinutā bhuvi sūramāṁbā .
ya svāmihitagarutmāN svāmihita
sakalakāryyasādhanahanūmāN
hari riva parabalabēdī guha Iva
nistārakōyaśaśaktiyutaḥ . śākā
bde karanaṁdakhēṁdugaṇitē caitrā
mavāsyāmi gōṁka śśaṁkarapā
dapaṁkajaratō gōkāṁbikā tatsatī
sāyaṁ sēya makhaṇḍa māyuguśa
taṁ mrōṁparppurōvāsinē dīpadvaya
madācca viśvaguravē śrīśaṁkarā
yādarāt .

svasti śrī mrōṁpaṟti cōḍē
śvaramahādēvaranuṁ drisaṁ
dhyalaṁ golvaṁggala sānulu
dāmanapāṁgu kūṁtuṟu
modalisāni prōlamaku bhū
mi khā nā0 . mallepāṁgu
kūṁtuṟu kētamaku bhū
mi khā nā0 . dāmanapā
ṁgu kūṁtuṟu pōtamaku
bhūmi khā nā0 . pinima
llepāṁgu kūṁtuṟu prōla
maku bhūmi khā nā0 .
nāgapi kūṁtuṟu nandama
ku bhūmi khā nā0 . malya
pāṁgu kūṁtuṟu mārama
ku bhūmi khā nā0 . ko
nipāṁgu kūṁtuṟu cōḍa
maku bhūmi khā nā0 .
nāgapa kūṁtuṟu bhīma
maku bhūmi khā nā0 .
Īdattiki nevvarēni vighnamu
puṭṭiṁcina vāru gaṁggaka
ṛta vēyiṭi nūṟu ka
vilala madhiṁccina pāpa
munaṁ bōvaṁggalavā
ru peddakoḍu kapāla
munaṁ guḍicina vāru
śrīcōḍēśvaramahādē
vara pūjari sū
riyadēvabhaṭlaku prō
leku gaḍvamaḍi
bhūmi khā .
yācaṁdrārkamu
naḍapaṁgalavā
ru manglamahā
śrī .
Digital edition of SII 10.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
